ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - Psychology
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
RimSynapse - Psychology Official Wiki and Documentation: https://github.com/RimSynapse/Psychology/wiki
Companion Mod for RimSynapse. Requires RimSynapse - Core. Brings your colonists to life by giving them evolving memories, complex interpersonal trust, therapeutic sessions, and trauma responses.
--- Current Features --- - Dynamic Personality Traits: The 24-hour psychological evaluation tracks profound life events. Pawns can dynamically gain or lose RimWorld traits (such as gaining Bloodlust after a brutal raid, or losing Kind) based on LLM analysis of their rolling short-term memory. - Trust and Familiarity System: Replaces vanilla's rigid opinion system with dynamic Trust (-100 to 100) and Familiarity (0 to 100) values. Vanilla OpinionOf is scaled down by 50%, with the custom Trust metric contributing the remaining 50% weight. - PTSD and Trauma Breaks: A new mental state, Trauma Trigger, causes pawns with severe negative memories to blindly fire their weapon at surrounding doors, walls, or loud noises before cowering in fear. Hitting a living creature snaps them out of it. - Player-Driven Therapy: Right-click pawns to initiate a Therapy Session. Act as a "Guiding Hand" and manually type out the initiating pawn's dialogue, or let the LLM resolve the conversation in the background based on their Intelligence, Social skill, and Ideology. - Opportunistic Euphoria: Pawns who maintain an extremely high mood (>90%) for a sustained 24 in-game hours will automatically generate a positive core memory. - Ritual Remarks: Colonists pull from their LLM relationship memories to deliver personalized Vows during marriages and Eulogies during funerals. - Forced Psychological Reviews: Demand an immediate clinical evaluation of the pawn's mental state from the LLM via the new Social Network tab. - World VIP Backstories: Faction Leaders are no longer generic. They generate with a rich, ideologically consistent history and personality profile.
--- Planned Upcoming Features --- - Couples Counseling and Dynamic Romance: Breakups and romances driven entirely by shared memories and psychological compatibility rather than RNG. - LLM-Generated Phobias: Pawns who suffer specific traumas (e.g., severe burns, insectoid attacks) may develop targeted phobias that alter their pathing and combat behavior. - Group Therapy: Let your highest-social pawn lead group sessions to mass-resolve colony-wide trauma after devastating events. - Psychological Addictions: Pawns may turn to specific drugs as a coping mechanism for specific negative memories.
--- Changelog --- v0.4.0 - Updated to support RimSynapse Core v0.4.0 (Multi-provider routing and Image generation).
--- Compatibility Matrix --- - Royalty DLC: Compatible and Optional. Integrates memories of nobility and royal power. - Ideology DLC: Compatible and Optional. Integrates crises of faith and spiritual rebirth memories. Required for deep Faction Leader generation. - Biotech DLC: Compatible and Optional. Integrates genetic dysphoria and vat-grown trauma. - Anomaly DLC: Compatible and Optional. Integrates void taint and cosmic horror PTSD. - RimSynapse - Factions: Compatible and Optional. Empowers world generation to build deep psychological profiles and traits for Faction Leaders. - RimSynapse - Chat: Compatible and Optional. Colonists' generated dialogue will be directly influenced by their current Trust levels, Familiarity, and accumulated traumas. - RimSynapse - WorldNews: Compatible and Optional. Prints gossip and news articles about your pawns' most dramatic psychological events and relationships.
--- Requirements --- - RimSynapse - Core (Must be loaded before this mod)
